description_long: This recliner features a modernist design with a deep brown, tufted leather upholstery covering both the seat and backrest. The cushions are generously padded and display a grid of deep button tufts, giving the surface a plush, inviting appearance. The frame is constructed from sleek, black-finished metal, forming a continuous curve that supports both the seat and backrest while providing a slight rocking or cantilevered effect. The legs are wide and flat, offering stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The backrest and seat are both rectangular and thick, with the upholstery tightly fitted and the seams neatly finished. There are no visible armrests or reclining mechanisms, and the overall silhouette is minimalist and iconic, reminiscent of mid-century modern lounge chairs.
description: A modern, brown tufted leather recliner with a sleek black metal frame and no visible armrests, featuring plush, buttoned cushions and a minimalist silhouette.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the deep brown tufted leather cushions and the sleek black metal frame curving beneath the seat.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the rectangular, button-tufted seat and backrest, with the wide, flat metal legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the leather-upholstered backrest and the continuous curve of the metal frame.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the smooth, unadorned back of the recliner and the sturdy metal supports.
attribute_armrest_design: No armrests are present; the sides are open with only the curved metal frame visible, contributing to a minimalist and open design.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is a single, continuous padded section with no visible segmentation or division.
